title: Pottery Sherd Copy Recipe│陶器碎片複製配方
description: Added Pottery Sherd copy recipe similar to Smithing Template copy recipe.│添加了類似於鍛造模板複製配方的陶器碎片複製配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
To copy Pottery Sherd, please replace the diamond part in the Smithing Template copy recipe with Brick, the original Pottery Sherd part with Smithing Template, and the rock part with the corresponding material.│複製陶片時，請將鍛造模板複製配方中的鑽石部分替換為紅磚頭，將鍛造模板部分替換為陶片，將岩石部分替換為相應材料。

**※你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方│You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"**
